title: The Selkirk Omni, According to 21 Reviewers
description: A synthesis of 21 Selkirk Omni reviews — the consensus (a more-controlled 'all-court Boomstick' with the best removable weight system in pickleball), the disputes (is $300 worth it; do the edgeguards and Infinigrit spin texture hold up), per-source verdicts grouped by reliability, and a who-should-buy bottom line. John Kew anchored as most reliable; sponsored reviews flagged.
